description_long: This armchair features a striking and unconventional upholstery that mimics the marbled appearance of raw red meat on the seat, inner backrest, and inner arm surfaces, creating a bold visual statement. The outer surfaces, including the back and sides, are covered in a beige, quilted or textured material that contrasts sharply with the vivid red and white marbling. The chair has a gently curved, enveloping backrest and armrests that flow seamlessly into the seat, providing a modern and comfortable silhouette. Four slender, black legs support the chair, slightly splayed for stability and a contemporary look. The seat and backrest appear to be padded for comfort, though no distinct removable cushions are visible. This unique design would stand out in any urban environment, blending avant-garde aesthetics with functional seating.
description: A modern armchair with bold red marbled upholstery resembling raw meat on the inner surfaces, contrasted by beige quilted outer sides and back, supported by slender black legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vivid red marbled upholstery on the seat, backrest, and inner arms, with black legs visible beneath.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the beige quilted outer surface and the transition to the red marbled inner upholstery, with the chair's profile and leg angle visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full beige quilted backrest and outer arms, with no red marbling visible, and both rear legs in view.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the beige quilted exterior and the red marbled interior, with the chair's modern profile and leg splay.
attribute_armrest_design: integrated, gently curved, upholstered in red marbled fabric on the inside and beige quilted fabric on the outside
attribute_backrest_style: medium-high, smoothly curved, fully upholstered with red marbled fabric inside and beige quilted fabric outside
attribute_leg_type: slender, straight, black metal legs, slightly splayed
attribute_upholstery_pattern: red and white marbled pattern on inner surfaces, beige quilted texture on outer surfaces
